name: Fires in the Sunlight
description:
The Oak & Pearl Market parking lot basks in sunlight. You, finishing what should have been an ordinary shopping trip, stand by your Ford F-150 Raptor R. The bed is filled with the finest American Wagyu steaks, wine, cheeses, chocolates, and seafood. Everything is perfect. But then a sharp, cutting scream tears through the calm, ripping the ordinary apart.

In front of the crowd, a love triangle erupts. Nick, burning with betrayal. Caroline, consumed by shame and guilt. And Mike, smirking, fanning the flames of chaos. Their fight grows more intense, and the whispers of onlookers and the glow of phone cameras only amplify the tension.

Now all eyes turn to you. Key in hand, you stand at a crossroads of choice.

Do you remain a spectator, watching this brutal drama unfold?
Do you step in as a mediator, trying to calm the storm?
Or do you walk away, leaving the chaos behind and returning to your own life with your carefully gathered indulgences?

A brief, intense moment on the asphalt. Human desire, betrayal, love, and pride collide in a single explosive scene. And your choice will determine everything.

Nick, Caroline’s boyfriend who was betrayed

Mike, the man Caroline cheated with
creator: ScreamingWolf
